unauthorized.title: Access Denied

login.title: Login to {{brand}}
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.missingFields: Please enter both email and password

registrationSuccess.title: Registration Successful!
registrationSuccess.defaultMessage: Your account has been registered successfully!
steps: Our administrators will review your shop information
You'll receive an email notification once your account is approved
After approval, you can sign in and start managing your deliveries

shopRegister.title: Register Your Shop
shopRegister.subtitle: Create a shop account to manage your deliveries
shopRegister.noteText: Shop accounts require administrator approval before you can sign in.
shopRegister.contactInfoDescription: Please provide details of the person we should contact regarding this account.
shopRegister.successMessage: Your shop account has been registered successfully! An administrator will review your application. You will be able to sign in once your account has been approved.

errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields. Zip/Postal Code is optional.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.invalidBusinessPhone: Please enter a valid business phone number (01xxxxxxxxx)
